heading: Governing body
label: 80505 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)80505(a)36:1606., , §§ 3 (related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, , 2596.Dec. 4, 1980Pub. L. 96–49794 Stat. 259580505(b)36:1607.80505(c)36:1603 (related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States where incorporated” in 36:1606 and 36:1607 are omitted as unnecessary.

L. 96–49794 Stat. 259580505(b)36:1607.80505(c)36:1603 (related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States where incorporated” in 36:1606 and 36:1607 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.
